scripts.lint: pnpm --filter webapp lint && pnpm exec eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern "apps/desktopapp/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "apps/desktopapp/*.ts" "packages/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "scripts/**/*.{js,mjs,cjs,ts,mts,cts}" eslint.config.mjs
scripts.typecheck:web: pnpm --filter @assembly/shared-types typecheck && pnpm --filter @assembly/domain typecheck && pnpm --filter @assembly/prompts typecheck && pnpm --filter webapp typecheck
scripts.typecheck:desktop: pnpm --filter @assembly/shared-types typecheck && pnpm --filter @assembly/domain typecheck && pnpm --filter @assembly/prompts typecheck && pnpm --filter desktopapp typecheck
